Uses of Class
com.destroystokyo.paper.MaterialSetTag

  • Packages that use MaterialSetTag 
    Package Description
    com.destroystokyo.paper  

    • Uses of MaterialSetTag in com.destroystokyo.paper

      Fields in com.destroystokyo.paper declared as MaterialSetTag 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.ARROWS  
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.BEDS
      Cover all 16 colors of beds.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.BUCKETS
      Covers all bucket items.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.COALS
      Covers coal and charcoal.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.COBBLESTONE_WALLS
      Covers both cobblestone wall variants.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.COBBLESTONES
      Covers both cobblestone and mossy Cobblestone.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.COLORABLE  
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.CONCRETE_POWDER
      Covers all 16 colors of concrete powder.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.CONCRETES
      Covers all 16 colors of concrete.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.COOKED_FISH
      Covers the two types of cooked fish.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.DYES
      Covers all 16 dyes.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.FENCE_GATES
      Covers all 6 wood variants of gates.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.FENCES
      Covers all 6 wood variants and nether brick fence.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.FISH_BUCKETS
      Covers all 4 variants of fish buckets.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.GLASS
      Covers the non-colored glass and 16 stained glass (not panes).
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.GLASS_PANES
      Covers the non-colored glass panes and 16 stained glass panes (panes only).
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.GLAZED_TERRACOTTA
      Covers all 16 glazed terracotta blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.GOLDEN_APPLES
      Covers both golden apples.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.HORSE_ARMORS
      Covers the 3 variants of horse armor.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.INFESTED_BLOCKS
      Covers the 6 variants of infested blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.MUSHROOM_BLOCKS
      Covers the 3 variants of mushroom blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.MUSHROOMS
      Covers both mushrooms.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.MUSIC_DISCS
      Covers all 12 music disc items.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.ORES
      Covers all 8 ores.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.PISTONS
      Covers all piston typed items and blocks including the piston head and moving piston.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.POTATOES
      Covers all potato items.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.PRESSURE_PLATES
      Covers all 6 wooden pressure plates and the 2 weighted pressure plates and 1 stone pressure plate.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.PRISMARINE
      Covers the 3 variants of prismarine blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.PRISMARINE_SLABS
      Covers the 3 variants of prismarine slabs.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.PRISMARINE_STAIRS
      Covers the 3 variants of prismarine stairs.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.PUMPKINS
      Covers the 3 variants of pumpkins.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.PURPUR  
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.QUARTZ_BLOCKS
      Covers the 4 variants of quartz blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.RAW_FISH
      Covers all uncooked fish items.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.RED_SANDSTONES
      Covers the 4 variants of red sandstone blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.REDSTONE_TORCH  
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.SANDSTONES
      Covers the 4 variants of sandstone blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.SHULKER_BOXES
      Covers the non-colored and 16 colored shulker boxes.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.SIGNS  
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.SKULLS
      Covers zombie, creeper, skeleton, dragon, and player heads.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.SPAWN_EGGS
      Covers all spawn egg items.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.SPONGES
      Covers sponge and wet sponge.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.STAINED_GLASS
      Covers all 16 colors of stained glass.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.STAINED_GLASS_PANES
      Covers all 16 colors of stained glass panes.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.STAINED_TERRACOTTA
      Covers the 16 colors of stained terracotta.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.TERRACOTTA
      Covers terracotta along with the 16 stained variants.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.TORCH  
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.TRAPDOORS
      Covers all 7 variants of trapdoors.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.WOODEN_FENCES
      Covers all 6 wood variants of fences.
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.WOODEN_GATES  
      static MaterialSetTag MaterialTags.WOODEN_TRAPDOORS
      Covers all 6 wood variants of trapdoors.
